rulings.Case Title: GRACIELA CANIZALEZ VS. HECTOR NAVARRO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants' Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 27,2012. Line 15 - Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants' Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admissions. 1)Court finds it is timely. Request for admissions' A) Request for admissions #6, deny as to all 3 plaintiffs. B) Request for admissions 12-18 Grant C) Request for admissions 27 Grant as to plaintiff Graciela Canizalez. Request for admissions 20 Grant as to plaintiff Dalia & Erlinda Canizalez. 2)Responses to form interrogatories, deny as to all plaintiffs responses to form interrogatories 2.3 to 17.1. =(501/REQ)
